name.full: Daniel Okafor — Market Research Analyst, Glyphor AI

description.short: Market Research — market sizing, cohort analysis, trend forecasting, and growth modeling.
description.full: Daniel Okafor is the Market Research Analyst at Glyphor AI. He maps markets, builds bottom-up TAM/SAM/SOM models, analyzes cohorts, and forecasts growth with stated assumptions. Message him directly for market research.
